notableEvents.label: Joshua Kuroda-Grauer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joshua Kuroda-Grauer grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Henry Bolte out at 2nd. Joshua Kuroda-Grauer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Henry Bolte singles on a ground ball to shortstop Otto Lopez. Carlos Cortes scores. Henry Bolte to 2nd. Henry Bolte advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Otto Lopez.

notableEvents.label: Joshua Kuroda-Grauer plunked
notableEvents.detail: Marlins challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Joshua Kuroda-Grauer hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Henry Bolte to 3rd. Joshua Kuroda-Grauer out at 2nd. Jeff McNeil out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Henry Bolte to 3rd. Joshua Kuroda-Grauer out at 2nd. Jeff McNeil out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Aaron Civale picks off Liam Hicks at 2nd on throw to shortstop Alika Williams.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández grounds out, shortstop Alika Williams to first baseman Nick Kurtz.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Henry Bolte singles on a ground ball to shortstop Otto Lopez. Carlos Cortes scores. Henry Bolte to 2nd. Henry Bolte advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Otto Lopez.
